titleStmt.title: SII 40.87: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 87. (A.R. No. B. 65 of 1930.) Mandāḍi, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab lying near the Hanumān temple outside the village.
This is dated Śaka 1281, Vikāri, Bhādrapada, ba 10, Sunday, corresponding to 1359 A.D., September 17. However the week day was Tuesday.

Records the gift of a village Mandāḍi in Palnāṁṭi-sīma for providing midday offerings and conducting services in the temple of Mallikārjunadēva by Sirigiri-Nāyaniṅgāru, son of Taṅgeḍa Māchala-Nāyaniṅgāru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avighnamastu svasti śrī jayā
bhyudaya śālivāhana śakava
ruṣaṁbulu 1281 Agunē
ṁṭi vikāri saṁvatsara bhādrapa
da ba 10 bhānuvāraṁnāṁḍu śrī
mallikārjunadēvara madhyāAhaṇapu
Avasarānakunnu Aṁggaraṁggavaibhavā
lakuṁnnu mā da gōtrapavitryālai
na taṁggeḍa mācalanāyaniṁgāri
komāruṁḍḍu śirigiri nāya
niṁgāru palnāṁṭi śīmalōni maṁ
ddāḍigrāmaṁ dāravośi yistimi
svadattā dviguṇaṁ paradattānaṁ pā
lanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ ni
ṣphalaṁ bhavēttu . sa lollikabhaṁ pūrrva
maiṁḍḍi kilamaitēnu nallapumalla
yya mallikhārjunadēvaraku pu
ṇyaṁgānu kaṁbhaṁ Ettiṁcce
nu śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 40.87 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
